abilities.name: 도주
abilities.description: 야생 포켓몬으로부터 반드시 도망칠 수 있다.

abilities.name: 주눅
abilities.description: 주눅이 들어 스피드가 올라가는 타입이 있다.

flavorTexts.text: This Pokémon uses its hard tail to make its nest by boring holes into bedrock deep underground. The nest can reach lengths of over six miles.
It drives enemies out of its nest by sucking in enough air to fill its long, narrow lungs, then releasing the air in an intense blast.
